dashboard.taxCount: You have {{count}} event(s) to review with your advisor
dashboard.taxTeaser: Tax review: detect events for your advisor (Pro)
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your portfolio at a glance. Everything is computed from your transactions and prices.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Record your crypto, stock or fixed-income purchases to see your overview here: total value, allocation and return.
dashboard.evolutionEmptyHint: Use “Take today's snapshot” to start tracking how your portfolio evolves.
dashboard.pnlHint: How your gain is made up
dashboard.pnlStakingNote: Includes {{value}} in units received from staking (counted within unrealized P&L).

posiciones.title: Positions
posiciones.subtitle: Computed automatically from your transactions. Read-only.
posiciones.emptyDesc: Record crypto or stock purchases to see your holdings, cost and return here.
posiciones.rfNote: Your fixed income (estimated value {{value}}) is detailed on its own screen.

movimientos.fEntryPriceHint: 0 if you don't know the entry price
movimientos.fxUnavailable: No data for that date; enter the rate manually.
movimientos.fxLockDate: Use this rate for all operations on this date
movimientos.fxPrivacy: One-off lookup to Frankfurter (only the date and the currency pair). Works even with live prices off.
movimientos.title: Transactions
movimientos.subtitle: Record your buys, sells, dividends, interest and staking.
movimientos.emptyAssetsDesc: You need at least one asset in the catalog to record transactions.
movimientos.emptyNoneFirst: Record your first operation to start computing your portfolio.
movimientos.emptyNoneFiltered: No transaction matches the selected filters.
movimientos.fFxRateHint: Exchange rate on the operation date.
movimientos.errFxRate: Exchange rate must be greater than 0.
movimientos.errPricePositive: Price per unit must be greater than 0.
movimientos.errAmountPositive: The amount received must be greater than 0.
movimientos.errFeesNonneg: Commission and withholding cannot be negative.

activos.labelsEmptyHint: Create labels in Settings → My labels.
activos.labelsFreeHint: 1 free label available. Create it in Settings.
activos.title: Assets & prices
activos.subtitle: Asset catalog, current prices and exchange rates.
activos.assetsHint: The current price is entered here; fixed income is valued in its module.
activos.emptyDesc: Add your first asset to start recording transactions.
activos.cannotDelete: You cannot delete "{{ticker}}": it has {{refs}} associated transaction(s) or position(s). Delete those first.
activos.rfNote: Enter the capital, rate and dates of this instrument on the Fixed income screen.
activos.errRequired: Ticker, name and currency are required.
activos.fFxValueHint: How many {{base}} 1 unit of that currency is worth.
activos.errFxCode: Enter a valid currency code (e.g. USD).
activos.errFxBase: The base currency is always worth 1; it needs no exchange rate.
activos.errFxValue: The value must be a number greater than 0.

rentaFija.fSavingsRateHint: Annual rate of your savings account.
rentaFija.savingsNote: Estimated interest at the current rate; the real amount depends on your daily balance.
rentaFija.isrNote: Shows gross interest and the net after ISR withholding (~{{rate}}%). Informational estimate, not a tax calculation; check with your advisor.
rentaFija.ipabWarning: ⚠️ This SoFIPO has no IPAB protection. Consider diversifying.
rentaFija.title: Fixed income
rentaFija.subtitle: T-bills, money market funds, coupon bonds and inflation-linked bonds.
rentaFija.emptyDesc: Create an asset of class “Fixed Income” in the catalog, then enter its capital, rate and dates here.
rentaFija.pendingNote: {{name}} · You haven't entered its capital, rate and dates yet.
rentaFija.unrecorded: You have {{count}} paid coupon(s) not recorded. Oldest: {{date}} for {{amount}}.
rentaFija.confirmDelete: Delete the entered data for {{ticker}}? The asset stays in the catalog.
rentaFija.fInstrumentHint: Determines which data is requested and how it is valued.
rentaFija.mmNote: Net contributions are taken from your transactions (Buy/Sell of this asset): {{value}}. Here just enter the current balance your platform reports.
rentaFija.fFaceValueTotalHint: What you get back at maturity.
rentaFija.errCapital: Capital invested must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errAnnualRate: The annual rate must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errTerm: The term in days must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errBalanceNonneg: The reported balance cannot be negative.
rentaFija.errFaceValue: The face value must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errCouponRate: The coupon rate must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errFirstCoupon: The first coupon date is required.
rentaFija.errFaceValueUnits: The face value in units must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errUnitAtPurchase: The unit value at purchase must be greater than 0.
rentaFija.errUnitCurrent: The current unit value must be greater than 0.

config.privacyNetwork: Exceptions (opt-in, you decide): live prices (CoinGecko / Yahoo / Frankfurter) and the on-demand historical exchange rate (Frankfurter). Only tickers, currency codes and dates are sent; never amounts, values or personal data.
config.liveGuide: To see live prices, go to Assets, pick each asset and choose its source (CoinGecko / Yahoo Finance). The switch only enables the feature; the source is set per asset.
config.liveGuideCta: Go to Assets and choose sources
config.title: Settings
config.subtitle: Base currency, allocation targets and data backup.
config.baseCurrencyHint: Everything is converted to and shown in this currency.
config.backupDesc: Your data lives only in this browser. Export a backup to keep it or move it to another computer; import it to restore.
config.invalidFile: The file is not a valid backup.
config.importConfirm: This will replace ALL your current data with the backup ({{assets}} assets, {{txns}} transactions). Continue?
config.readError: Could not read the file (is it valid JSON?).
config.dangerDesc: Deletes all data (assets, transactions, fixed income, snapshots) and leaves the portfolio empty. It cannot be undone; back up first if you want to keep anything.
config.dangerConfirm1: Delete ALL data and start over? This action cannot be undone.
config.dangerConfirm2: Confirm again: assets, transactions, fixed income and snapshots will be deleted.
config.dangerDone: Data deleted. Your portfolio is empty.
config.liveOff: Off: the app makes no internet connection and you enter prices manually. Turn it on only if you want automatic prices.
config.privacyBody: When this feature is on, the app queries external servers to get prices. The only data sent are your assets' tickers (e.g. BTC, MSFT) and currency codes. No personal information, quantities or portfolio values are sent.
config.privacySources: Sources: CoinGecko (crypto), Yahoo Finance (stocks), Frankfurter (exchange rates).
config.assignNote: Assign each asset's source (CoinGecko / Yahoo / Manual) on the Assets & prices screen.
config.encExportDesc: Protect the backup file with a password. Keep it safe: if you forget it, the backup cannot be opened.
config.encImportDesc: This backup is encrypted. Enter its password to import it.

lock.title: Portfolio locked
lock.hint: If you forgot your PIN there is no way to recover the encrypted data; restore it from your JSON backup.

security.title: Security
security.descOff: Protect your portfolio with a PIN and encrypt the data on this computer. It is off by default.
security.descOn: Encryption is on: the app asks for your PIN on open and the data is stored encrypted.
security.warnBody: ⚠️ If you forget the PIN, the encrypted data CANNOT be recovered. When you turn it on, a JSON backup is downloaded: keep it somewhere safe — it is your only way to recover.
security.disableBody: The PIN will be removed and the data will be left unencrypted on this computer. You need your current PIN to confirm.
security.backupFirst: A JSON backup was downloaded. Keep it safe: if you forget the PIN, it is the only way to recover your data.
security.errPinShort: The PIN must be at least 4 characters.

consulting.title: Personalized tax advisory
consulting.subtitle: 30-min session with an expert in crypto, investments and tax compliance in Mexico.
consulting.payNote: You pay for the session, then schedule it with the advisor.

tour.sectionDesc: A 4-step walkthrough of the key parts of the app.
tour.step1Body: I'll show you the app in 4 quick steps. You can skip at any time.
tour.step2Body: Here you see your total value, return and how your portfolio is allocated.
tour.step3Body: From here you log stocks, crypto, CETES or any asset. You just capture; the app calculates everything.
tour.step4Body: In the Help section you'll find video tutorials, FAQs and the advisor's contact.

maturity.noMaturity: No maturities recorded. Add maturity dates when capturing fixed-income instruments.

activate.title: Activate license
activate.intro: Paste the code and signature you received by email when you bought your plan.
activate.success: {{tier}} license activated! Thank you for your purchase.
activate.errorInvalid: Invalid code. Check that you copied the full code and signature.
activate.backToFreeConfirm: Remove the license and go back to the Free plan? Your data is kept; only the free-plan limits apply.

anomaly.title: This code was recently activated on another machine.
anomaly.body: If you shared it, consider buying your own copy. We don't block anything.

paywall.needPro: Available in Pro, Premium and Lifetime.
paywall.maxAssetsReached: You reached your plan limit ({{max}} assets). Activate Pro for more.

labels.title: My labels
labels.no_labels: You don't have any labels yet
labels.cannot_delete: To delete a label, first remove it from all its assets.

diversification.title: Diversification
diversification.no_data: Add at least 2 assets to see your diversification
diversification.no_sector: No stocks or crypto to classify by sector yet

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Bring in your history from Excel/CSV with flexible column mapping.
import.modeTransactionsHint: Buys, sells, dividends, interest… (one row per operation).
import.modeSnapshotHint: A current snapshot: asset, quantity and average cost. Creates one opening buy per position.
import.step1Desc: Accepts .xlsx, .xls and .csv. Don't have one? Download the template above, fill it in and come back.
import.step2Desc: We read {{rows}} row(s). If the first row has column names, leave it checked.
import.step3Desc: Tell us which column of your file maps to each field. Fields marked with * are required.
import.openingDateHint: Date used for the opening buys.
import.missingRequired: Map all required fields (*) to continue.
import.err_badAmount: invalid amount (Price must be greater than 0)
import.noValid: No valid rows to import. Check the mapping and the errors.
import.tplInstructionsTitle: How to fill in the template
import.tplIntro: Fill one row per movement. The export's “… in base” columns are informational: the app computes them and they are ignored on import.
import.tplCurrencyHint: ISO code of the operation currency (USD, EUR, MXN, BTC, ETH…).
import.tplFxHint: Exchange rate from the operation currency to your base currency. Leave 1 if it is the same currency.
import.tplFeeHint: In the same currency as the operation. Leave 0 if not applicable.
import.tplCalculatedNote: The export's “Amount / Commission / Net in base ({{base}})” columns are computed automatically; if present in the file, they are ignored on import.
import.errEmpty: The file is empty or could not be read.
import.errRead: Could not read the file. Is it a valid .xlsx or .csv?
import.emptyHintDesc: Importing is the fast way to start: download the template, fill it with your history and upload it.

updates.title: Updates
updates.error: Couldn't check for updates. Check your connection and try again.
updates.unsupported: Updates only work in the installed app (not in the browser).
updates.badgeReady: Update ready to install. Click for details.

autoCheck.label: Check for updates automatically
autoCheck.description: I check for a new version every 7 days.

autoDownload.label: Download automatically
autoDownload.description: If there's an update, I download it in the background. You decide when to restart.

analisis.title: Analysis
analisis.subtitle: Alerts, commissions, rebalancing, benchmarks and goals. Information, not recommendations.
analisis.alertsEmpty: No alerts. Your portfolio is within parameters.
analisis.commissionsEmpty: No commissions recorded in your transactions yet.
analisis.liquidityEmpty: You have no fixed income maturing soon.
analisis.rebalanceEmpty: Add your portfolio to see rebalancing suggestions.
analisis.rebalanceBalanced: Your mix is close to target. Nothing to rebalance.
analisis.rebalanceBuy: Consider buying ~{{amount}} of {{class}} to get closer to your target.
analisis.rebalanceSell: Consider selling ~{{amount}} of {{class}} to get closer to your target.
analisis.benchmarksEmpty: Add transactions to compute your portfolio return.
analisis.benchHint: Manually enter the returns to compare.
analisis.goalsEmpty: You have no goals yet. Create one below.
analisis.goalRequiredMonth: You need ~{{amount}} per month to make it on time.

tax.title: Events to review with your advisor
tax.intro: The app detects and describes events; it does NOT calculate taxes or give advice. Review each one with your advisor.

alerts.driftOver: {{class}} is {{diff}} points ABOVE your target. Consider rebalancing.
alerts.driftUnder: {{class}} is {{diff}} points BELOW your target. Consider rebalancing.
alerts.noRebalance: It's been {{days}} days without a snapshot/rebalance.

ayuda.title: Help
ayuda.subtitle: Quick start, videos, FAQ and support.
quickStart: Set your base currency and targets in Settings.
Add your assets in Assets & prices (crypto, stocks, fixed income).
Enter your operations in Transactions (or use Import to bring your history).
Enter your fixed-income details on its screen.
Review your overview in Dashboard and Analysis.
videoTitles: Mexican fixed income (CETES, promissory notes, Nu)

faq.q: Does my data leave my device?
faq.a: No. Everything is stored locally (IndexedDB). No account, no cloud. The only network calls are opt-in: live prices and the on-demand historical exchange rate.

faq.q: How do I back up my data?
faq.a: In Settings → Backup, export a JSON file (encrypted too). Import it to restore on another device.
Export the backup on the old device and import it on the new one. Your license travels inside the backup.

faq.q: I lost my license code, what now?
faq.a: Write to us from Report a problem; with your purchase email we resend your code.
Free up to 15 assets; Pro 30 + export, live prices and alerts; Premium/Lifetime unlimited + benchmarks, goals and rebalancing.

faq.q: How do I import my history?
faq.a: In Import, download the template, fill it and upload it. You can map your columns and review errors before importing.

faq.q: Does the app calculate my taxes?
faq.a: No. It detects and describes events (sales, interest, dividends, staking) for you to review with your advisor. It does not calculate tax.

faq.q: How do I enable live prices?
faq.a: In Settings turn on the switch, then in Assets choose a source per asset (CoinGecko or Yahoo).

faq.q: What is ISR withholding on promissory notes/SoFIPOs?
faq.a: An informational estimate of withholding on interest; it is not a tax calculation. Confirm with your advisor.
The PIN cannot be recovered. Restore from the JSON backup you downloaded when you enabled encryption.

ayuda.reportIntro: Fill the form; it builds a text you can copy and paste into the contact form or your email. The app sends nothing over the network.
ayuda.reportPrivacy: The text stays in your clipboard; you decide where to paste it.
ayuda.fTried: What were you trying to do?

acerca.title: About
acerca.subtitle: Personal Portfolio Tracker
acerca.desc: Local app to track your investments —crypto, stocks and fixed income— in a single base currency. You enter your operations and prices; everything else is computed automatically.
acerca.privacyBody: All data is stored only in this browser (IndexedDB). There is no account, no cloud, no servers. To back up or move your information, use Export / Import JSON in Settings.
acerca.builtBody: React, Vite and TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Dexie.js (IndexedDB) · Recharts · Zustand.

onboarding.step1p1: This is your Personal Portfolio Tracker: an app that lives only in your browser to track your investments —crypto, stocks and fixed income— in a single currency.
onboarding.step1p2: You enter your operations and prices; everything else is computed automatically.
onboarding.step1p3: We open with sample data so you can explore freely. You can delete it anytime from Settings.
onboarding.step2intro: There are three data-entry screens, marked with a gold dot:
onboarding.step2li1: Transactions — buys, sells, dividends, interest and staking.
onboarding.step2li2: Assets & prices — the current price of each asset and the exchange rates.
onboarding.step2li3: Fixed income — the data of your T-bills, bonds and money market funds.
onboarding.step2note: Positions and Dashboard are read-only: they show what the system computes from what you entered.
onboarding.step3p1: Each operation and price is stored in its original currency. The app converts everything to your base currency using the exchange rates you enter.
onboarding.step3p2: Your data never leaves this device: no account, no cloud, no servers. To back up or move your information use Export / Import JSON in Settings.
onboarding.step4intro: Define your base currency and how you want to split your portfolio. It's just a reference to compare your real allocation against your target.
onboarding.step4Footer: You can change all of this in Settings.
